name: Optex Systems Holdings Inc
summary: Optex Systems Holdings, Inc. is a defense-focused manufacturer that produces optical and electro-optical systems and assemblies. The company supplies products for military applications, with offerings relevant to defense programs. It operates under fixed-price contracts and serves the U.S. government and defense industry, with operations subject to federal procurement regulations and military spending cycles.
